articles.description: — Bennedict Mathurin scored 28 points, John Collins 22 and Kawhi Leonard 20 as the Los Angeles Clippers got past the short-handed Milwaukee Bucks 127-113 on Sunday for their fifth consecutive win.
articles.headline: Mathurin scores 28 to pace Clippers past short-handed Bucks 127-113
